name: audience-constraint-check
triggers: The deliverable is directed at a consumer beyond the requester, such as an email, memo, report, briefing, handoff, or summary for a team, board, executive, investor, on-call engineer, client, or customer
The reader or actor on the deliverable is not the person making the request
A draft's length, format, or jargon level conflicts with the named consumer's constraints
counterindications: The requester is the sole consumer; notes have no downstream reader
Audience constraints were already gathered and checked this session
